# 長期照顧－AA01照顧計畫擬訂與服務連結問卷回應範例 - 臺灣長期照顧實作指引 (Taiwan Long-Term Care Implementation Guide) v0.4.1

* [**Table of Contents**](toc.md)
* [**Artifacts Summary**](artifacts.md)
* **長期照顧－AA01照顧計畫擬訂與服務連結問卷回應範例**

## Example QuestionnaireResponse: 長期照顧－AA01照顧計畫擬訂與服務連結問卷回應範例

Profile: [長期照顧－AA01照顧計畫擬訂與服務連結問卷回應](StructureDefinition-LTCQuestionnaireResponseAA01.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ltc-questionnaire-response-aa01-example
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[照顧計畫擬訂與服務連結問卷 (AA01)](Questionnaire-questionnaire-aa01-example.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-group.png)planTarget
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 計畫目標
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)phoneContactDate
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 電聯日期
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 2024-01-10T14:00:00+08:00
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)homeVisitDate
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 家訪日期
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 2024-01-15T09:00:00+08:00
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)coVisitors
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 偕同訪視者
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-group.png)caseOverview
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案概況
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)physicalMentalCondition
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 身心概況
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 個案意識清楚，因中風導致左側偏癱，身障等級為中度，目前定期至復健科就診，服用抗凝血藥物。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)economicIncome
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 經濟收入
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 領有身障津貼每月4,872元，女兒提供生活費，無其他收入來源。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)livingEnvironment
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 居住環境
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 與女兒同住於3樓公寓，環境整潔，已安裝扶手及防滑墊，使用助行器輔助行走。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)socialSupport
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 社會支持
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 女兒為主要照顧者，支持度高，鄰里關係良好，已申請居家服務，無高風險因子。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)other
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 其他
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 退休前為公務員，生活規律，重視家庭關係。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)reassessmentValue
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 複評評值
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 個案狀況穩定，各項服務執行良好，目標達成率達80%以上。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)careGoals
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 照顧目標
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1. 維持基本日常生活功能 2. 提升行動能力 3. 預防跌倒 4. 維持社會參與
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)discrepancyExplanation
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 與照專建議服務項目、問題清單不一致原因說明及未來規劃、後續追蹤計劃等
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 經與案家討論，目前暫無備餐之意願，改為代購服務。個案身體狀況穩定，同意接受專業服務。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-group.png)executionPlan
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 計畫執行規劃
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-group.png)approvedServices
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 長照服務核定項目、頻率
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)bCodeServices
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): B碼(輪派/指定○○○單位)
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)cCodeServices
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): C碼:(輪派/指定○○○單位)
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): CA01[身體照顧服務]: 協助個案進行日常生活活動，包括個人衛生、穿衣等，提升生活品質。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)dCodeServices
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): D碼
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): DA01[居家復健]: 每週2次，協助個案進行肢體復健訓練，提升左側肢體功能。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)eFCodeServices
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): E.F碼
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): EA01[輔具服務]: 提供助行器維護及調整服務，確保使用安全。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)gCodeServices
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): G碼
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): GA01[交通接送]: 每月4次，接送個案至醫院就診及復健。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)scCodeServices
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): SC碼
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): SC01[喘息服務]: 每月2次，提供家屬喘息服務，每次4小時。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)mealServices
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 營養餐飲服務: 1日核定○○餐(午/晚餐)
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 1日核定2餐(午/晚餐)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)emergencyServices
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 緊急救援服務
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 緊急救援連線服務，24小時監控，遇緊急狀況立即通報。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)otherServices
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 轉介其他服務資源
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 轉介至社區關懷據點，參與健康促進活動，維持社會參與。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)otherNotes
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 其他備註
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 個案家屬配合度高，建議定期追蹤服務品質，如有需要可調整服務內容。
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format



## Resource Content

```json
{
  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "ltc-questionnaire-response-aa01-example",
  "meta" : {
    "profile" : ["http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/StructureDefinition/LTCQuestionnaireResponseAA01"]
  },
  "questionnaire" : "http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/Questionnaire/questionnaire-aa01-example",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/ltc-patient-chen-ming-hui"
  },
  "authored" : "2024-01-15T10:30:00+08:00",
  "author" : {
    "reference" : "PractitionerRole/ltc-practitioner-role-nurse-example"
  },
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "planTarget",
    "text" : "計畫目標",
    "item" : [{
      "linkId" : "phoneContactDate",
      "text" : "電聯日期",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueDateTime" : "2024-01-10T14:00:00+08:00"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "homeVisitDate",
      "text" : "家訪日期",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueDateTime" : "2024-01-15T09:00:00+08:00"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "coVisitors",
      "text" : "偕同訪視者",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "陳明輝(個案本人)"
      },
      {
        "valueString" : "陳美玲(女兒，主要照顧者)"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "caseOverview",
      "text" : "個案概況",
      "item" : [{
        "linkId" : "physicalMentalCondition",
        "text" : "身心概況",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "個案意識清楚，因中風導致左側偏癱，身障等級為中度，目前定期至復健科就診，服用抗凝血藥物。"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "economicIncome",
        "text" : "經濟收入",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "領有身障津貼每月4,872元，女兒提供生活費，無其他收入來源。"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "livingEnvironment",
        "text" : "居住環境",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "與女兒同住於3樓公寓，環境整潔，已安裝扶手及防滑墊，使用助行器輔助行走。"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "socialSupport",
        "text" : "社會支持",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "女兒為主要照顧者，支持度高，鄰里關係良好，已申請居家服務，無高風險因子。"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "other",
        "text" : "其他",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "退休前為公務員，生活規律，重視家庭關係。"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "reassessmentValue",
        "text" : "複評評值",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "個案狀況穩定，各項服務執行良好，目標達成率達80%以上。"
        }]
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "careGoals",
      "text" : "照顧目標",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "1. 維持基本日常生活功能 2. 提升行動能力 3. 預防跌倒 4. 維持社會參與"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "discrepancyExplanation",
      "text" : "與照專建議服務項目、問題清單不一致原因說明及未來規劃、後續追蹤計劃等",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "經與案家討論，目前暫無備餐之意願，改為代購服務。個案身體狀況穩定，同意接受專業服務。"
      }]
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "executionPlan",
    "text" : "計畫執行規劃",
    "item" : [{
      "linkId" : "approvedServices",
      "text" : "長照服務核定項目、頻率",
      "item" : [{
        "linkId" : "bCodeServices",
        "text" : "B碼(輪派/指定○○○單位)",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "BA13[陪同外出]*32: 每週3次,一次2個單位(3*2*4.5=27),陪同個案推助步車到公園散步及購置晚餐。每月5次,搭配陪同就醫使用。共計27+5=32(單位/月)"
        },
        {
          "valueString" : "BA14[陪同就醫]*5: 每週1次,陪同個案至XX醫院XX科及XX科回診。"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "cCodeServices",
        "text" : "C碼:(輪派/指定○○○單位)",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "CA01[身體照顧服務]: 協助個案進行日常生活活動，包括個人衛生、穿衣等，提升生活品質。"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "dCodeServices",
        "text" : "D碼",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "DA01[居家復健]: 每週2次，協助個案進行肢體復健訓練，提升左側肢體功能。"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "eFCodeServices",
        "text" : "E.F碼",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "EA01[輔具服務]: 提供助行器維護及調整服務，確保使用安全。"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "gCodeServices",
        "text" : "G碼",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "GA01[交通接送]: 每月4次，接送個案至醫院就診及復健。"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "scCodeServices",
        "text" : "SC碼",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "SC01[喘息服務]: 每月2次，提供家屬喘息服務，每次4小時。"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "mealServices",
        "text" : "營養餐飲服務: 1日核定○○餐(午/晚餐)",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "1日核定2餐(午/晚餐)"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "emergencyServices",
        "text" : "緊急救援服務",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "緊急救援連線服務，24小時監控，遇緊急狀況立即通報。"
        }]
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "otherServices",
      "text" : "轉介其他服務資源",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "轉介至社區關懷據點，參與健康促進活動，維持社會參與。"
      }]
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "otherNotes",
    "text" : "其他備註",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "個案家屬配合度高，建議定期追蹤服務品質，如有需要可調整服務內容。"
    }]
  }]
}

```
